underlying_goal: Implement a two-layer Chinese candidate intelligent scoring system (rule engine with jieba + optional LLM scoring), then review and fix code defects, and commit the changes
friction_detail: Initial implementation caused legacy tests to fail due to auto-loading JD config when enhanced data wasn't present, requiring a sentinel fix.
brief_summary: User asked to implement a Chinese candidate scoring system with jieba/LLM integration, review for defects, and commit — all tasks were completed successfully with 81 tests passing.
